title: Badal
desc: Badal witnesses his family being massacred during a riot in his village. He is raised by a terrorist and soon sets out to exact revenge on the police officer responsible for his family's murder.

title: Happy Ending
desc: Yudi is suffering from writer's block and his publishers decide to stop supporting him and instead publish the work of an Indian bestselling author. So, he must do something soon to maintain his fame.

title: Zameer The Fire Within
desc: A spoiled brat gets married to her professor despite several challenges. Soon after, he learns that his wife was responsible for the separation of his ex-girlfriend and he leaves her, never to return.

title: Zakhmi Insan (dub) (dass Tamil)
desc: Antony falls in love with Rajeswari who belongs to an upper caste family. When her father kills her sister for marrying a man from the lower caste, she decides to elope with Antony.
